properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: By predestination I’ve been contacted For Angelic visitation My life has been appointed Even though there are many Many going downstream I am moving upwards against the worldly currents, I’m a heavenly being

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I’m Journeying upstream Like the rainbow trout Going back to the place where I came from I’m journeying upstream Though many obstacles are in my way I’m per-se-vering by the grace of God everyday

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It’s my destiny to go back to my origin I feel that strange call to go back to be with Him Perfection is calling me to unite with my theophany I’m being prepared in this school of life, For migration to the other side

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I’ve been told about my pre-existence, my Earthly journey and my eternal destination This was a great mystery but now this truth has been opened By this Law of navigation I’m being led To my eternal home

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Going home (mmmmm) I’m going home (yes I’m going home) Journeying back! (to where I came from) I won’t turn back (I won’t turn around) Going home (back to Eden) I’m going home (Yes I’m on my way) There’s no turning back My pedigree is original
